top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(link_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
           COUNT(*) AS link_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1  -- posts are questions (PostTypeId = 1)
      AND p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND strftime('%Y', pl.CreationDate) = '2010'
    GROUP BY month
) AS monthly_links;

SELECT AVG(link_count) AS average_monthly_links
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
        COUNT(pl.Id) AS link_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    INNER JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1 -- Questions only
      AND p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND strftime('%Y', pl.CreationDate) = '2010'
    GROUP BY month
) monthly_counts;

FROM (
    SELECT strftime('%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
           COUNT(*) AS link_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    INNER JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1
      AND p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND pl.CreationDate >= '2010-01-01'
      AND pl.CreationDate < '2011-01-01'
    GROUP BY month
) AS monthly_counts;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(link_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
           COUNT(*) AS link_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1  -- posts are questions (PostTypeId = 1)
      AND p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND strftime('%Y', pl.CreationDate) = '2010'
    GROUP BY month
) AS monthly_links;
